title: SpaceX in Talks with Pentagon for AI Computing Power in Multi-Billion Dollar Deal
summary: SpaceX is negotiating with the U.S. Department of Defense to provide data center computing power for running AI models, with a potential deal value of tens of billions of dollars. This deal would significantly expand SpaceX&\#x27;s relationship with the Pentagon and accelerate the military&\#x27;s adoption of AI, impacting national security and cloud computing markets. The negotiations are ongoing and could still fall through. SpaceX recently signed similar computing power supply agreements with Anthropic and Google, and plans to greatly expand its cloud computing business.
context: The Pentagon is accelerating efforts to acquire cloud computing capabilities to support AI applications in national security and daily operations. Several tech companies, including SpaceX, Amazon, Google, Microsoft, and Oracle, have been approved to use AI models in classified environments. SpaceX is known for its Starlink satellite network and Starship launch vehicle, but is also building out a cloud computing offering.
